things.name: Victoria Falls (Livingstone side)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage world's largest waterfall - the Smoke that Thunders

things.name: Great Zimbabwe Ruins
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage medieval African city - the largest stone structure in sub-Saharan Africa

things.name: Hwange National Park
things.description: Zimbabwe's finest wildlife reserve with the largest elephant population in the world

things.name: National Museum of Zimbabwe
things.description: Great Zimbabwe artefacts, Victoria Cross medals and natural history

things.name: Mbare Musika Market
things.description: Harare's largest market and bus terminus - the living heartbeat of Zimbabwe

things.name: National Botanical Gardens
things.description: Well-kept gardens with indigenous Zimbabwean trees and plants

things.name: Zimbabwe Museum of Human Sciences
things.description: Colonial-era museum now reframed around indigenous Shona and Ndebele culture

things.name: Chapungu Sculpture Park
things.description: Beautiful garden displaying Zimbabwe's world-famous Shona stone sculpture

things.name: Borrowdale Village
things.description: Harare's leafy upscale suburb with the best restaurants and craft markets

things.name: Sadza with Nyama at Gava's
things.description: Zimbabwe's staple dish - stiff maize meal with slow-cooked game meat stew
